prestazioni: Engine: H27A 2.7L V6 twin-turbo (Pikes Peak-spec) with forged internals, billet crankshaft, and Carrillo connecting rods, paired with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Moroso for sustained high-G cornering. Turbochargers upgraded to Garrett GT4202R with 1.28 A/R turbine housings and 76mm compressor wheels, feeding 3.5 bar of boost via a custom TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate setup.

Drivetrain: Sequential 6-speed transmission (Ricardo PT7200) with a Sachs triple-disc carbon clutch and a Quaife ATB differential, mated to a custom 4WD system with a 50/50 torque split and a Pikes Peak-optimized transfer case by Hewland for rapid power delivery adjustments.

Suspension & Chassis: Full carbon-fiber monocoque chassis with a custom roll cage by Safety Devices, featuring Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with 250mm of travel, spherical bearing control arms by Tractive Suspension, and a hydraulic handbrake system by Tilton for hairpin maneuverability. Braking system includes AP Racing 6-piston calipers with 400mm carbon-carbon rotors and Pagid RS14 pads for fade resistance.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon-fiber bodywork with a Pikes Peak-specific aero kit by Rocket Bunny, including a 2.2m wide front splitter, dual-element rear wing with Gurney flaps, and underbody diffusers by APR Performance. Custom NACA ducts integrated into the hood and fenders for optimized airflow to the intercoolers and brakes.

Exterior: Custom livery by RAUH-Welt BEGRIFF (RWB) featuring a matte black base with neon green accents, Pikes Peak race numbers, and sponsor decals (e.g., Yokohama Advan, HKS, and NGK). Lightweight polycarbonate windows by Lexan and a custom carbon-fiber roof scoop for engine bay cooling.

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage by Safety Devices with a Sparco Pro 2000 seat, Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom carbon-fiber dashboard housing a Motec C187 dash logger and a Pikes Peak-specific GPS lap timer. Fire suppression system by Lifeline with plumbed-in nozzles for engine bay and cockpit protection.
